title: Combinational always block produces incorrect logic

features.name: combinational_always_with_x_condition
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with level-sensitive list containing variables that can take x values, where the if condition evaluates to x

features.name: x_propagation_in_if_else
features.description: Code should include an if-else statement where the condition input is driven to x, and x should propagate to the output rather than selecting the else branch
